rcicrdiagnostics 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • rcicrdiagnostics: user's guide

Construct an rcdiag_result object

Source: R/rcdiag_result.R
rcdiag_result.Rd

Every diagnostic function in the package returns an object of class "rcdiag_result". This constructor is the single source of truth for the result shape.

Usage

rcdiag_result(status, label, detail, data = list())

Arguments

status

One of "pass", "warn", "fail", or "skip".

label

Short (one-line) description of the check.

detail

Human-readable explanation of the result. Multiple lines allowed.

data

Optional list of supporting data (data frames, flagged participant ids, summary statistics). Defaults to an empty list.

Value

An object of class "rcdiag_result": a list with elements status, label, detail, and data.

Examples

rcdiag_result("pass", "Response coding", "All responses coded {-1, 1}.")
#> [PASS] Response coding
#>   All responses coded {-1, 1}.
